title: Aureline environment-capsule diff-and-redaction packet
description: Boundary schema for the environment-capsule diff-and-redaction packet. Every rerun, reattach, debug-attach, apply, refactor-preview, and hosted-review replay flow that needs to answer 'what changed in the environment since the last run?' reads and emits this record. The packet compares two environment_capsule_record bodies (schemas/runtime/environment_capsule.schema.json) by layer and emits a per-layer status ('preserved', 'changed', 'added_on_b', 'removed_on_b', 'degraded_on_a', 'degraded_on_b', 'redaction_limited') the consuming surface can render as user-visible deltas without reassembling per-surface prose. Raw environment bodies, raw command lines, raw secret values, and raw filesystem paths outside the ADR-0006 filesystem-identity record never appear on the packet; a layer that cannot be explained without them records a 'redaction_limited' status and a typed reason. Re-exports the frozen vocabularies from schemas/runtime/environment_capsule.schema.json and schemas/runtime/execution_context.schema.json; this schema does not mint new authority, target, toolchain, secret, or sink classes. Adding a new diff_layer, a new diff_status, a new diff_context, or a new redaction_limited_reason is additive-minor and bumps environment_diff_schema_version; repurposing an existing field is breaking and requires a new decision row.

environment_diff_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this diff packet. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the diff packet shape.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp captured at diff assembly time.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log and export. Raw secrets, raw absolute paths outside the ADR-0006 filesystem-identity record, raw URLs, and raw content bodies never appear here.

short_sentence.description: Short reviewer-facing sentence safe to show in capsule diff inspectors and export reviews. Raw secret values, raw env bodies, and raw command lines never appear here.

diff_context.description: Why the diff was assembled. Every diff names exactly one context. Reruns compare two invocations on the same surface; reattach compares a reconnect against the previous session seed; debug_attach compares a debug seed against the execution it is attaching into; apply compares an AI/apply proposed environment against the authoritative one; refactor_preview compares a preview-sandbox environment against the workspace environment; hosted_review_replay compares a replay capsule against the original capture; import_probe compares an import candidate against the target workspace; doctor_explain compares two capsules named by the user in aureline doctor --explain.

consuming_surface_class.description: Re-export of the consuming-surface vocabulary from schemas/runtime/environment_capsule.schema.json.

redaction_class.description: Re-export of the ADR-0007 redaction-class vocabulary. metadata_and_hashes_only is the default; broadened_capture requires a recorded approval_ticket_ref.

authority_envelope_tag.description: Re-export of the frozen per-field authority-envelope tag vocabulary.

diff_layer.description: Closed list of diff layers. Mirrors the top-level field groups of environment_capsule_record. capsule_identity groups capsule_id / capsule_hash / resolved_schema_version so a hash change is legible as one entry rather than three.

diff_status.description: Per-layer diff status. 'preserved' means both capsules carry the same token / hash / count for the layer; 'changed' names a visible difference. 'degraded_on_<side>' and 'unknown_on_<side>' allow the diff to express that a layer was unresolved on one side without silently re-asserting it on the other. 'redaction_limited' records that a broader capture would be required to explain the difference; this MUST NOT be used to hide a visible token change.

redaction_limited_reason.description: Closed list of reasons a layer could not be expanded. A packet that records 'redaction_limited' MUST name one of these reasons.

secret_projection_delta_kind.description: Closed vocabulary of user-visible secret-projection delta kinds. Raw secret values never appear; only class labels, counts, and mode changes project. raw_value_present_flipped is admissible only when redaction_class is broadened_capture on both capsules and a recorded approval_ticket_ref is carried on the enclosing diff.

secret_class.description: Re-export of the ADR-0007 secret-class vocabulary.

secret_projection_delta_entry.description: One user-visible secret-projection delta. Tied one-to-one with a secret_class; a class with no change is not emitted.

declarative_input_delta_kind.description: Closed vocabulary of declarative-input delta kinds.

a_input_kind.description: Re-export of the declarative_input_kind vocabulary. Null when the input did not exist on side A.

b_input_kind.description: Re-export of the declarative_input_kind vocabulary. Null when the input does not exist on side B.

a_value_summary.description: Class labels, frozen tokens, opaque ids, hashes, or counts drawn from capsule A. Raw env bodies, raw command lines, and raw secret values MUST NOT appear.

b_value_summary.description: Same as a_value_summary, drawn from capsule B.

degraded_reason.description: Re-export of the capsule degraded-reason vocabulary. Required when status is degraded_on_a or degraded_on_b.

secret_projection_deltas.description: Present only when layer is secret_projection_markers. Raw secret values never appear; only class labels, counts, and mode changes project.

declarative_input_deltas.description: Present only when layer is declarative_inputs. Raw file bodies never appear; only kind / ref / content-digest changes project.

approval_ticket_ref.description: ADR-0007 approval ticket ref when redaction_class is broadened_capture. Null otherwise.

environment_diff_record.description: Structured diff between two environment_capsule_records. Names every layer that changed and every layer that was preserved so rerun, reattach, debug-attach, apply, refactor-preview, and hosted-review replay flows cite one machine-readable object instead of reassembling per-surface prose. Raw env bodies, raw command lines, and raw secret values never appear; a diff that cannot be explained without them records a redaction_limited status and a typed reason.
